impressum.title: Impressum
impressum.intro: Information obligation according to section 5 E-Commerce-Gesetz (ECG) and section 25 Mediengesetz (MedienG).
impressum.name: {{operatorName}}
impressum.euDisputeText: In accordance with Regulation (EU) No 524/2013, the European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR):
impressum.euDisputeNote: We are neither obligated nor willing to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.
impressum.disclaimerText: Despite careful content control, we assume no liability for the content of external links. The operators of the linked pages are solely responsible for their content.
impressum.vatNote: In accordance with section 6 (1) Z 27 UStG, no sales tax is charged (Kleinunternehmerregelung).

datenschutz.title: Privacy Policy
datenschutz.introText: The protection of your personal data is important to us. This privacy policy explains which data we collect, how we use it, and your rights under the General Data Protection Regulation (GDPR).
datenschutz.controllerText: The controller responsible for data processing on this website is:
datenschutz.dataCollectedIntro: We collect the following personal data:
datenschutz.dataAccount: Account data: Email address and encrypted password (hashed with argon2id) when you register.
datenschutz.dataLearning: Learning data: Topics, flashcards, reviews, and study statistics you create during use.
datenschutz.dataTechnical: Technical data: Server logs containing IP address, timestamp, and request details for security and debugging purposes.
datenschutz.dataPayment: Payment data: Payment processing is handled by Stripe (see Section 8). We do not store credit card data. Stripe receives the data necessary for payment processing (email, name).
datenschutz.legalBasisContract: Processing of account and learning data is based on Art. 6(1)(b) GDPR (performance of a contract) — it is necessary to provide the service you signed up for.
datenschutz.legalBasisLegitimate: Processing of technical data (server logs) is based on Art. 6(1)(f) GDPR (legitimate interest) — specifically, the security and stability of the service.
datenschutz.storageText: Your data is stored on a self-hosted server located in Austria. Data is not transferred to third countries. An exception is payment processing via Stripe (headquartered in the USA), which is carried out on the basis of the EU Commission's adequacy decision (EU-US Data Privacy Framework, Art. 45 GDPR).
datenschutz.retentionText: Your personal data is stored as long as your account exists. Server logs are retained for a maximum of 30 days. When you delete your account, all your data (profile, topics, cards, reviews, media files) is permanently and irreversibly deleted. Tax-relevant records (e.g. billing data) are retained for 7 years in accordance with § 132 BAO.
datenschutz.rightsIntro: Under the GDPR, you have the following rights:
datenschutz.rightAccess: Right of access (Art. 15 GDPR): You can request information about the personal data we store about you.
datenschutz.rightRectification: Right to rectification (Art. 16 GDPR): You can request correction of inaccurate data.
datenschutz.rightErasure: Right to erasure (Art. 17 GDPR): You can request deletion of your data. You can delete your account at any time through the application.
datenschutz.rightPortability: Right to data portability (Art. 20 GDPR): You can request an export of your data in a machine-readable format.
datenschutz.rightRestriction: Right to restriction of processing (Art. 18 GDPR): You can request the restriction of processing of your data, e.g. if you contest the accuracy of the data.
datenschutz.rightObjection: Right to object (Art. 21 GDPR): You have the right to object at any time to the processing of your data based on legitimate interest (Art. 6(1)(f)). This applies in particular to the processing of technical data (server logs). In the event of an objection, we will no longer process the data concerned unless there are compelling legitimate grounds.
datenschutz.rightComplaint: Right to lodge a complaint: You have the right to lodge a complaint with the Austrian Data Protection Authority (Datenschutzbehörde, dsb.gv.at).
datenschutz.cookiesText: We do not use cookies. We use browser localStorage to store your authentication token (JWT) and language preference. This data never leaves your browser and is not used for tracking.
datenschutz.thirdPartyIntro: LearnForge processes all learning data locally on its own infrastructure.
datenschutz.thirdPartyStripe: Payment processing is handled by Stripe Inc. (USA). A data processing agreement (Art. 28 GDPR) is in place with Stripe. Stripe processes the data necessary for payment (email, name). Data transfer to the USA is based on the EU-US Data Privacy Framework (Art. 45 GDPR). We do not store credit card data.
datenschutz.thirdPartyEmbeddings: To support similarity search, numerical vector representations (embeddings) are computed from the text of your flashcards. This computation is performed entirely on the Operator's server — no data is transmitted to external services.
datenschutz.thirdPartyFsrs: Learning intervals are calculated by an algorithmic scheduler (FSRS) that evaluates only your response behavior on individual cards and does not create personal profiles.
datenschutz.thirdPartyNone: We do not use any third-party analytics, advertising, or tracking services.
datenschutz.automatedText: No automated decision-making within the meaning of Art. 22 GDPR takes place. The algorithmic calculation of learning intervals and similarity scores serves exclusively to support learning and has no legal or similarly significant effects on you.
datenschutz.changesText: We may update this privacy policy from time to time. The current version is always available on this page with the date of last update.

agb.title: Terms of Service
agb.scopeText: These terms of service ("Terms") govern your use of the LearnForge platform ("Service"), operated by {{operatorName}}, {{operatorAddress}}, {{operatorCity}} ("Operator").
agb.serviceText: LearnForge is a spaced repetition learning platform. It provides tools for creating, organizing, and reviewing flashcards using scientifically optimized scheduling algorithms.
agb.serviceAvailability: No specific availability (SLA) is guaranteed. Planned maintenance will be announced in advance where possible.
agb.contractText: The contract is formed by creating an account and actively consenting to these Terms. A valid email address is required for registration.
agb.contractAge: Users must be at least 14 years old.
agb.contractProvision: These Terms are made available to the user in a storable format before contract formation.
agb.trialText: After registration, users receive a free trial period of 30 days with full functionality. No payment is required during the trial period.
agb.trialConversion: The trial period ends automatically after 30 days. There is no automatic conversion to a paid subscription. The user must actively subscribe through the account settings.
agb.trialExpiry: After the trial period expires without a subscription, the account remains active but access to learning features is restricted. Existing data is preserved and can still be exported.
agb.pricingText: The subscription is available as a monthly plan (EUR 4.99 per month) or an annual plan (EUR 48.00 per year, equivalent to EUR 4.00 per month). All prices include all taxes (VAT-exempt under Kleinunternehmerregelung). Billing is processed through the payment provider Stripe.
agb.pricingRenewal: The subscription renews automatically at the end of each billing period (monthly or annually) unless cancelled before renewal.
agb.pricingReminder: The Operator will notify the user by email in due time before the end of the billing period about the upcoming automatic renewal and the option to cancel.
agb.pricingDefault: In case of payment default, the user will be notified by email. If payment remains outstanding after a 14-day grace period, the Operator may suspend access to the Service.
agb.withdrawalText: You have the right to withdraw from this contract within 14 days without giving any reason. The withdrawal period is 14 days from the date of contract conclusion (completion of the paid subscription).
agb.withdrawalHow: To exercise your right of withdrawal, you must inform us ({{operatorName}}, {{operatorAddress}}, {{operatorCity}}, {{operatorEmail}}) of your decision to withdraw by means of a clear statement (e.g. email). To meet the withdrawal deadline, it is sufficient to send the notification before the withdrawal period expires.
agb.withdrawalEffect: Consequences of withdrawal: If you withdraw from this contract, the Operator shall reimburse all payments received from you without undue delay and no later than 14 days from the day on which the notification of withdrawal was received. The same means of payment used for the original transaction will be used for the reimbursement.
agb.withdrawalExpiry: Early expiry: If you have expressly consented to the performance of the Service beginning before the withdrawal period expires and have acknowledged that you thereby lose your right of withdrawal upon complete performance of the contract, the right of withdrawal expires upon commencement of the service.
agb.withdrawalFormIntro: (If you wish to withdraw from the contract, please complete this form and send it back.)
agb.withdrawalFormText: I hereby withdraw from the contract concluded by me for the provision of the following service: LearnForge subscription
agb.durationUserText: Termination by User: You may cancel your subscription at any time effective at the end of the current billing period. Cancellation can be made through the account settings (Stripe customer portal) or by email to {{operatorEmail}}. After cancellation, the Service remains accessible until the end of the paid period. Fees already paid for the current period are not refunded, unless the statutory right of withdrawal (Section 6) applies.
agb.durationOperatorText: Termination by Operator: The Operator may terminate the contract for cause with immediate effect, in particular in the event of:
agb.durationOperatorRefund: If the Operator terminates the contract without fault on the part of the user, fees already paid for the unused period will be refunded on a pro-rata basis.
agb.discontinuationText: Should the Operator permanently discontinue the Service, users will be notified at least 60 days in advance by email.
agb.discontinuationRefund: In the event of discontinuation, the Operator will refund fees already paid for the unused period on a pro-rata basis.
agb.discontinuationExport: Before final discontinuation, the Operator will provide an export function for all user data (see Section 9).
agb.dataExportText: Users can download their data (topics, flashcards, reviews, statistics) at any time via the export function in JSON format. The export format is documented and enables transfer of data to other services.
agb.dataExportGrace: After cancellation or service discontinuation, the export function remains available for 30 days. After this period, all user data will be permanently and irreversibly deleted.
agb.dataExportRetention: This does not apply to data that must be retained due to legal obligations (e.g. § 132 BAO — tax-relevant records). Such data will be deleted after the statutory retention period expires.
agb.warrantyText: Statutory warranty rights under the Verbrauchergewährleistungsgesetz (VGG) apply. The Service must conform to contractual and objective requirements.
agb.warrantyRemedies: In the event of defects, the user is entitled to restoration of conformity. If this is not possible or unreasonable, the user is entitled to a price reduction or contract termination.
agb.warrantyDevelopment: The Service is under active development. Features and user interface may change. Such developments do not constitute defects as long as the core functionality (creating, organizing, and reviewing flashcards) is preserved. Changes that materially impair the contractual use will be announced at least 30 days in advance. The user has a special right of termination in such cases.
agb.liabilityGross: In cases of slight negligence, the Operator is only liable for breaches of essential contractual obligations (obligations whose fulfillment is a prerequisite for the proper performance of the contract). In such cases, liability is limited to the foreseeable, contract-typical damage, up to a maximum of EUR 59.88 (equivalent to one year of the monthly subscription).
agb.liabilityConsequential: The Operator is not liable for consequential damages, lost profits, or lost data insofar as these are attributable to slight negligence.
agb.liabilityBackup: The Operator performs regular data backups. In addition, the user can use the export function at any time (see Section 9). The Operator is liable for data loss within the scope of the preceding paragraphs.
agb.liabilityProduct: Liability under the Produkthaftungsgesetz (Product Liability Act) and claims for damages under Art. 82 GDPR remain unaffected.
agb.securityText: The Operator implements appropriate technical and organizational measures in accordance with the state of the art to ensure the security of user data (Art. 32 GDPR).
agb.securityDisclaimer: Absolute security against all conceivable attacks cannot be guaranteed. The Operator undertakes to promptly address known security vulnerabilities.
agb.securityBreach: In the event of a data breach, the Operator will notify affected users and the competent supervisory authority in accordance with Art. 33 and 34 GDPR.
agb.securityUser: The user is responsible for the security of their login credentials (password).
agb.usageRule1: not use the Service for unlawful purposes
agb.usageRule2: not upload content that is illegal, harmful, or infringes on third-party rights
agb.usageRule3: keep their login credentials confidential and not share them with third parties
agb.usageRule4: use each account for the personal use of a single individual only
agb.ipUserContent: The user retains full ownership of all content they create (flashcards, topics, notes). The Operator receives only the usage rights necessary to provide the Service (storage, processing, display).
agb.ipLicense: The user receives a non-exclusive, non-transferable right to use the platform for the duration of the contract within the scope of intended use.
agb.ipPlatform: The source code of the LearnForge platform is publicly available under the GNU Affero General Public License v3.0 (AGPL-3.0).
agb.priceChangesText: The Operator may change prices for future billing periods. Price changes will be communicated to the user by email at least 30 days before the start of the next billing period.
agb.priceChangesCancel: If the user does not agree with the price change, they may cancel the subscription before the start of the new billing period. The cancellation takes effect at the end of the current (already paid) period.
agb.privacyText: The Operator processes personal data in accordance with the separate Privacy Policy. This is part of the contractual offer and is made available to the user before registration.
agb.changesText: The Operator may change these Terms with a notice period of at least 30 days. Changes will be communicated by email to the registered address and clearly described.
agb.changesObjection: For material changes, the user will be prompted to actively consent upon their next login. If the user does not consent, the previous Terms remain in effect until the end of the current billing period. The user has a special right of termination in this case. Fees already paid will be refunded on a pro-rata basis.
agb.changesMinor: Editorial or clarifying changes that do not materially affect the rights and obligations of the user do not require separate notice.
agb.disputesOdr: The European Commission provides a platform for online dispute resolution (ODR):
agb.disputesNote: The Operator is neither obligated nor willing to participate in dispute resolution proceedings before a consumer arbitration board.
agb.lawText: These Terms are governed by Austrian law. For consumers residing in the EU, the mandatory provisions of the consumer protection law of their country of residence apply insofar as they are more favorable.
agb.lawJurisdiction: Jurisdiction is determined by statutory provisions. Consumers may bring claims at their general place of jurisdiction.
agb.finalSeverability: Should any provision of these Terms be or become invalid, the validity of the remaining provisions shall not be affected.
agb.finalCurrent: The current version of these Terms applies.

meta.impressumDescription: Legal notice and contact information for LearnForge.

meta.docsDescription: Documentation — how to connect and use LearnForge with Claude.

docs.title: Documentation
docs.subtitle: Learn how to connect LearnForge to Claude and get the most out of your AI tutor.

whatIs.title: What is LearnForge
whatIs.description: LearnForge is a spaced repetition platform that connects to Claude as a connector (Model Context Protocol). Every time you review a concept, the AI rephrases the question — so you prove real understanding, not pattern recognition.
whatIs.feature1: Tracks your understanding across six cognitive levels (Bloom's Taxonomy) — from basic recall to critical thinking
whatIs.feature2: Schedules reviews with a science-backed algorithm that adapts to how you study
whatIs.feature3: Creates interactive flashcards with formulas, diagrams, and quizzes through conversation

connect.title: Connect to Claude
connect.prerequisite: You need a <registerLink>LearnForge account</registerLink> (free, no credit card required) and a Claude account (any plan — the free tier includes 1 connector).
connect.step1: Open claude.ai and go to Settings > Connectors
connect.step2: Scroll down and click Add custom connector
connect.step5: You will be redirected to sign in with your LearnForge credentials
connect.step6: In a conversation, click the + button, select Connectors, and toggle LearnForge on
connect.note: Authentication uses OAuth 2.0 — no API key needed. Works on any Claude plan, including the free tier.

study.title: Study with AI
study.description: Claude starts by showing your study summary — how many cards are due, your new card count, and your Bloom level distribution. Then you pick a topic and study mode.
study.chatModeDesc: You type free-form answers in your own words. This is the deepest form of learning — correct answers earn longer review intervals.
study.mcqModeDesc: Multiple choice questions for faster sessions. Great for quick reviews, but intervals are shorter since recognition is easier than recall.
study.workflow: Claude asks questions one by one, adapted to your current Bloom level. After each answer you get immediate feedback — what was right, what's missing, and a hint for next time. At the end, you see a session summary with your accuracy and any Bloom level changes.

cards.title: Create Cards with AI
cards.prompt2: Make a flashcard for the Krebs cycle
cards.description: Claude generates a visual flashcard with a clean question on the front and an interactive explanation on the back — including accordion sections, KaTeX formulas, and SVG diagrams where appropriate.
cards.workflow: You always see a rendered preview first. Nothing is saved until you explicitly confirm. You can request changes ("make it simpler", "add a diagram", "change the question") as many times as you like before approving.

manageCards.title: Manage Cards
manageCards.description: Beyond creating cards, you can ask Claude to edit, delete, or review your existing cards and study schedule:
manageCards.cap1: Edit cards — change the question, update the answer, or move a card to a different topic
manageCards.cap2: Delete cards you no longer need
manageCards.cap3: View your due forecast — see how many reviews are coming up by day or month
manageCards.cap4: Upload images and audio to cards for visual learning and diagrams

topics.title: Manage Topics
topics.prompt1: Create a topic called Organic Chemistry
topics.description: Claude can organize your learning material into a topic hierarchy. What you can do:
topics.cap1: Create new topics, optionally nested under a parent
topics.cap3: Build multi-level hierarchies (e.g. Biology > Cell Biology > Mitosis)
topics.cap4: Delete empty topics (cards must be moved or deleted first)

help.title: Need Help?
help.contact: If you run into any issues or have questions, reach out to us and we'll do our best to help.

register.agbCheckbox: I agree to the <agbLink>Terms of Service</agbLink> and acknowledge the <privacyLink>Privacy Policy</privacyLink>.
register.agbRequired: You must agree to the Terms to continue.

billing.withdrawalConsent: I agree that the Service begins immediately and acknowledge that I thereby lose my right of withdrawal.
billing.withdrawalRequired: You must consent to the waiver of the right of withdrawal to proceed.
